projects.title: Touchless Tap
projects.description: ECE lab developed a cost-effective product to ensure safety during the Corona pandemic. The sensor-based water tap works without manual operation when it detects your hand under the nozzle. Designed and developed by Research Engineers Sana & Khagendra.
